title: cordia trichotoma f. puberula
intro: Cordia trichotoma f. puberula, also known as the 'Silver Buttonbush', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia trichotoma f. puberula include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
